name: state-cards-for-tavern-continuity
title: State Cards for Tavern Continuity
description: Design and implement a continuity foundation for long-running tavern sessions: authoritative character/task/resource/conflict/log cards and canon ledger rules so AI can propose drama without silently overwriting durable state.
creator: lijin
notes:
Child task created from NPC/preset/tavern-continuity brainstorm. Focus: State Cards / Canon Ledger continuity foundation before GM/skill-pack features.
Full implementation confirmed by user on 2026-04-29; design/research/implementation plan recorded in implementation-plan.md.
Implementation finished and verified on 2026-04-29; see implementation-note-2026-04-29.md.

meta.principle: AI may propose drama; durable canon belongs in structured cards/ledger and requires validation.
